description.value: You're from the shores of Marata and able to dart through the water as fast as you walk on land. Your aptitude at swimming is apparent, but you can quickly translate that skill into operating in zero-gravity environments. Your claws are duller and shorter than maraquois who climb, but you have tough webbing between your fingers and toes. You don't feel disoriented while floating in the water or in space. You don't have a climb Speed. You gain a swim Speed of 25 feet. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.Breath Control] general feat and aren't @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Off-Guard] while in water or zero gravity.
